== Notes for [[Item:Q88355|Q88355]] ==

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01054.htm#0
http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.com/~jamesdow/s028/f118044.htm

RESEARCH NOTES:
Satrap of Armenia

CHILIARCH OF PERSIA; 480-428 BC

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
